Yes, overall the best aspect of an Over-Exaltation is "stockpiling" Aliemus. However, the content in the game is completable without any character having an Over-Exaltation. Only certain characters' Over-Exaltation is worthwhile and that is only for high scoring Dream Dive content and D-Tides, etc.
ngl feels kinda bad to spend so many pulls for stuff like 3% more of some stat
so probably not feasible to keep up being a low spender
Good wheels to have stacked fully are Giant's blade or Incalculable Factor for example
Those are safe bets.
Don't need the + enlightens that badly so dw if you're not going to spend too much

Song of the Bound is rather safe for several Assist characters to have at E3. Though not limited to Song of the Bound per se, simply because the effect is based on a percentage and E3 enables 100% activation.
Only a few characters care at all badly about going to + for levels or stats and those characters are the ones who had good stats already

Oh apologies, distracted and misread the question. Helot-Catena's Red Torrent Wheel of Destiny is very good and probably the best in-slot, though Breaking the Chain ([standard] Helot's Wheel of Destiny) is a suitable replacement and Beast of the Celestial Sky is also a great main in-slot. Giant's Blade, especially if you already have it, functions well though perhaps the best secondary Wheel of Destiny for those who are "whaling".
Honestly yes, Helot-Catena E0 is perfectly fine.
You'll get it to +12 with standard wheels if you're targeting any anyways eventually lol
Absolutely haha
Also, for characters in the team fulfilling an Assist role, it behooves one to not forego brown-rarity Wheel of Destinies. Many provide exceptional effects.
Just like characters like ramona and ogier are still quite popular later the low rarity wheel of destinies are still quite good
Yes, many of the base characters scale rather well with varying degrees of investment and team composition. As mentioned above those two are probably the best with minimal investment.
As far as gacha games go, this one doesn't require one to spend a lot of money or any money at all. Depends on how invested one is into the game and how difficult the game is for one to complete.

My team is this now, anything I can improve on?

You can put Ogier instead of Nautila for a defensive role as he'll be able to increase strength and apply vulnerable which is more beneficial to your team than the retaliation Nautila gives (she does give more shields, but it's not that much more early game). That 4 star wheel on Nautila, "The land of Nonexistence" is not great if the wearer doesn't have many cards that specifically say it acts as, "Defence". Also, adding a card another defence card without other benefits aside from pure shielding is bad value (bloating deck with extra shield card that you are incentivized to use). You can move the wheel from Helot-Catena to Karen and put a more DPS orientated wheel on her (Karen's wheel is fine, but you are not benefitting much from it right now unless you are poison team and keep exalting Karen (pretty sure you want to use Tiny Wish on 24 or Helot more often than Karen)).
If the team works though, it works. Just use whatever characters you like the most if they can clear the stage
Land of Nonexistence is a really solid generic Sr tank wheel
